CE1.justification: Acted directly with no clarifying questions to the user.

CE2.justification: Compact opener but appends an unrequested corroborating-evidence path (access-grant dates vs. first commit) that extends the reply past what was asked.

CE3.justification: Says where (observations.md) but the why — epistemic framing rather than ADR — is implied via reply content, not signaled as a short in-band routing clause.

CE4.justification: One clean append to observations.md; partial completion would leave no orphaned artifacts.
